issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' not 'Activated'. The effect activates when a DON!! card is returned to deck (automatic trigger), not an activated ability.
Missing condition for '[Your Turn]'. Must include duration constraint 'DuringYourTurn'.
Target scope incomplete. Must specify 'rested' Characters with cost ≤3. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' lacks rested state filter and cost condition.
